reference: HER VOICE WAS LOW AND AGREEABLE A CULTIVATED VOICE AND SHE EXTENDED A SLENDER WHITE HAND TO HER VISITOR WHO REMARKED WITH SOME SOLEMNITY HE FELT A CERTAIN GUILT OF PARTICIPATION IN MISSUS LUNA'S INDISCRETION THAT HE WAS INTENSELY HAPPY TO MAKE HER ACQUAINTANCE
text: Her voice was low and agreeable, a cultivated voice, and she extended a slender white hand to her visitor. She remarked with some solemnity: "He felt a certain guilt of participation in Missus Luna's indiscretion; that he was intensely happy to make her acquaintance."
